instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable launch control when vehicle starts from standstill.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate launch control when Vehicle_Speed equals zero and throttle input exceeds threshold.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed = 0 AND Throttle_Position > Launch_Throttle_Threshold THEN Activate_Launch_Control
